title: Calycorectes densiflorus

The Myrtaceae family is a large and diverse group of plants commonly known as the myrtle family. This family includes many species of trees, shrubs, and herbs that are native to tropical and subtropical regions. Calycorectes densiflorus is often found in humid and warm environments.

intro: Calycorectes densiflorus, commonly known as Brazilian cherry or guanabara, is a plant species in the family Myrtaceae, native to the tropical regions of Brazil.
